name: open-academic-paper-machine
description: Open Academic Paper Machine — Autonomous academic paper production system. Uses MCP academic-search tools (Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, CrossRef, arXiv) for literature search, snowballing, and export. PaperBanana MCP for AI figure generation based on Zhu et al. (2026, arXiv:2601.23265). 8 skill engines (literature, theory, method, writing, figure, verification, LaTeX, review) with fill-in-the-blank templates. One command (/write-paper) triggers the full 8-phase pipeline from topic to complete first draft with LaTeX, PDF output, citation verification, and automated revision. /verify-citations for standalone citation checking. /respond-reviewers for revision automation.

args: if [ -f "$PWD/.env" ]; then set -a; . "$PWD/.env"; set +a; fi; exec paperbanana-mcp
